architectReview.evidence: Architecture: cloak_provider_read resolves providers only through the fail-closed facade and dispatches only names on an explicit per-provider READ allowlist; resolution + allowlist run BEFORE the session gate so unknown/unsupported requests fail closed without a browser. Session is built per-call via the provider's build<Provider>Session; output passes markUntrustedBrowserContent. Product: unknown provider/host and write/helper names are refused; valid reads reach the session gate. Code: single generic dispatcher + one allowlist table (no per-action copy), imports facade from providers/index.mjs (not the engine root); engine provider modules unchanged.
commands: leader architect review over G004 changeset (tools/providers.mjs, index wiring, stdio catalog, providers.contract.test.mjs)

executorQa.evidence: Fail-closed refusals proven for unknown provider id, unknown host (generic fallback), invalid url, write action at the read boundary, and helper-as-read. Valid read actions (explicit id and URL-resolved) pass the allowlist and reach needs-preflight. Full mcp suite (31) green; provider-registry engine tests (13) unaffected.

artifactRefs.description: Phase 3 API QA report: fail-closed cases + allowlist

contractCoverage.obligation: unknown/invalid provider or host is refused with no dispatch
only read actions are dispatchable; writes/helpers refused

surfaceEvidence.invocation: direct handler calls: unknown/invalid/write/helper refusals + valid-read allowlist pass to session gate

iteration.evidence: Leader ai-slop-cleaner sweep on the G004 changeset: no blocking findings — refusals are grounded facade/allowlist outcomes (no fallback masking), single dispatcher + one allowlist table (no duplication), no dead code. Fixed one real import error during the sweep (facade functions live in providers/index.mjs, not the engine root). Full suite rerun clean.
